scripts.dev: concurrently -n "backend,admin,web,mobile" -c "cyan,magenta,yellow,green" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:web && npm run build:mobile
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd hotel-backend && npm install && cd ../hotel-admin && npm install && cd ../hotel-web && npm install && cd ../hotel-mobile && npm install
scripts.lint: npm run lint:admin && npm run lint:web
